intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把乡村 pub、包不见了、付不了账、狗把包叼走这条轻松误会线读出来。

sentences.text: After I had had lunch at a village pub, I looked for my bag.
sentences.focus_zh: After I had had lunch 里第一个 had 是过去完成时，第二个 had lunch 是吃午饭；village pub 要读成乡村小餐馆式的 pub。

sentences.text: I had left it on a chair beside the door and now it wasn't there!
sentences.focus_zh: had left 是更早发生的事；beside the door 是在门旁边，读出前后对比。

sentences.text: As I was looking for it, the landlord came in.
sentences.focus_zh: was looking for 表示正在找；landlord 在这里是 pub 老板，不是租房房东。

sentences.text: Yes, thank you, I answered, but I can't pay the bill.
sentences.focus_zh: can't pay the bill 是付不了饭钱，不是故意不付；bill 在这里是 meal bill。
haven't got 是英式日常说法，意思是 do not have with me。

sentences.text: The landlord smiled and immediately went out.
sentences.focus_zh: smiled 要读出老板知道原因的轻松感；immediately 是马上。

sentences.text: In a few minutes he returned with my bag and gave it back to me.
sentences.focus_zh: returned with my bag 是拿着包回来；gave it back to me 是把它还给我。

sentences.text: My dog had taken it into the garden. He often does this!
sentences.focus_zh: had taken 是更早发生的动作；He often does this 是标题笑点，读得轻松一点。
